title: Meaning of BROKEN_SCREEN
seoDescription: What does it mean to dream of BROKEN_SCREEN?
introduction: To dream of BROKEN_SCREEN represents kirik ekran sembolü, algilarimizin ve içsel dün....
symbolism: This symbol is associated with kırık ekran, rüya tabiri, bilinçaltı, psikolojik analiz, spiritüel mesaj.
